CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Westley Lowe, Esq. and Rachel S. Gendell, Esq. for Petitioners: Theresa Daily and Farless Dailey, III. present as guardian ad litem for the minor Claimants: Jamie Dailey, Nilcholas Dailey and Angela Dailey, were sworn and examined.
Order SEALING portions of the Petitions to Approve Compromise of Claim and portions of any Orders Approving Compromise of Claim has been granted by Judge Quidachay on Feb. 25, 2004.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Balace of the settlement preceeds to be deposited into a blocked accounts with Washington Mutual, San Francisco-West Portal Branch, 98 West Portal, San Francisco, CA. 94127.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record in chambers and deemed confidential and placed under seal.
Order Approving Compromises of Claim signed in chambers.
Six-8.5" x 11" sealed envelops, containing the SEALED DOCUMENTS "Attachment "A" of Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account filed in Court, and hand delivered to Rosie Noguera with the Record Section.
